values.name: BlockAndAlert
values.description: Block the request or response and raise an alert.

values.description: Raise an alert but allow the request or response to proceed.

values.description: Remove the detected content and allow the request or response to proceed.

sensitivity.description: The sensitivity level of prompt injection detection.

responseLocations.description: The JSONPath expressions selecting the parts of the response body to scan for prompt injection.

onDetection.description: The action to take when prompt injection is detected.
